message:
perf(color): Replace linear search with O(1) lookup in to_256_color

Replace the linear search through 6 cube values with direct boundary
checks. The xterm 256-color cube has fixed values [0, 95, 135, 175,
215, 255] with boundaries at midpoints: 48, 115, 155, 195, 235.

Benchmark improvement:
- to_256_color: 52% faster (41.5ns → 19.9ns)

Isomorphism: Output values are identical for all inputs (verified
via property tests and unit tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
